acceptance_criteria.title: Runtime exposes a documented CLI or stable library entrypoint for read-only workflow execution
agent() extraction ignores comments and string literals
Inert-spine checks detect banned operations in executable template literal interpolation
Supported leaf adapters dispatch through route-profile slot targets without model-prefix inference
Mutating workflow execution remains blocked unless adapter preservation status is verified
ADAPTER_PRESERVATION_STATUS update criteria and fail-closed default are anchored in ADR-0006
Documentation states supported workflow subset, adapter support, and explicit unsupported cases

commits.message: test(CL-182u): red - AC2 comment/string-safe agent extraction
feat(CL-182u): green - AC2 comment/string-safe agent extraction
test(CL-182u): red/green - AC3 template literal interpolation detection
feat(CL-182u): green - AC1 CLI entrypoint for read-only workflow execution
test(CL-182u): green - AC4 route-profile slot dispatch without model-prefix inference
test(CL-182u): green - AC5 hardened journal integration
docs(CL-182u): AC7 anchor ADAPTER_PRESERVATION_STATUS update criteria in ADR-0006
docs(CL-182u): AC8 document supported workflow subset, adapters, and unsupported cases

tests.command: uv run pytest tests/test_workflow_runtime_production.py tests/test_workflow_runtime_spike.py tests/test_workflow_journal_hardening.py tests/test_route_profiles_schema.py -v

tests.result: 787 passed, 23 skipped, 3 failed: missing op-credentials catalog entry and remote CL-4mt migration commit checks

downstream_impacts: The workflow runtime now has a stable read-only CLI surface.
agent() extraction now ignores comments and string literals while preserving existing JSON-literal leaf parsing.
Runtime docs explicitly state unsupported Workflow JS constructs and fail-closed mutating adapter policy.
